creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
>>Description:
> 
> Update to 2.0.
> 

Here's an updated patch against the one in the current tree - now at version
2.1.


Index: astime/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /cvs/FreeBSD/ports/x11-clocks/astime/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.6
diff -u -r1.6 Makefile
--- Makefile    1999/02/22 04:29:39     1.6
+++ Makefile    1999/05/22 07:06:20
@@ -1,17 +1,17 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   astime
-# Version required:    1.7
+# Version required:    2.1
 # Date created:        21 Nov 1998
 # Whom:                Brian Handy <handy@physics.montana.edu>
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.6 1999/02/22 04:29:39 steve Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=      astime-1.7
+DISTNAME=      astime-2.1
 CATEGORIES=    x11-clocks windowmaker
-MASTER_SITES=  http://bewoner.dma.be/Albert/linux/software/ \
+MASTER_SITES=  http://bewoner.dma.be/Albert/software/ \
+               http://www.tigr.net/afterstep/as-apps/download/astime/ \
                ftp://ftp.tux.org/pub/x/afterstep/apps/astime/ \
-               ftp://ftp.digex.net/.2/wm/AfterStep/apps/astime/ \
-               ftp://ftp.bse.bg/pub/Unix/X11/wm/afterstep/apps/astime/
+               ftp://ftp.digex.net/.2/wm/AfterStep/apps/astime/
 
 MAINTAINER=    kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
 
Index: astime/files/md5
===================================================================
RCS file: /cvs/FreeBSD/ports/x11-clocks/astime/files/md5,v
retrieving revision 1.5
diff -u -r1.5 md5
--- md5 1999/02/22 04:29:56     1.5
+++ md5 1999/05/22 07:07:30
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (astime-1.7.tar.gz) = 9af13c86d442108abdae770c4d780b9f
+MD5 (astime-2.1.tar.gz) = 5caddd4d6fe33c04d2a964e4e79f19a1

---
Chris Piazza    Abbotsford, BC, Canada
           cpiazza@home.net
finger norn@norn.ca.eu.org for PGP key
